scripts.serve: concurrently "cd blog-vite-vue3 && pnpm serve" "cd blog-api-ts && pnpm serve" --names "前端,后端" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.install:all: concurrently "cd blog-vite-vue3 && pnpm install" "cd blog-api-ts && pnpm install" --names "前端安装,后端安装" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "cd blog-vite-vue3 && pnpm build" "cd blog-api-ts && pnpm build" --names "前端构建,后端构建" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
